name: Emotion Image Attachment
description: Auto-detect emotion in agent responses and attach matching images to Discord messages.

imageDir.description: Directory containing emotion image files. Defaults to assets/ inside this extension.

emotionMap.description: Mapping from emotion tag to image filename (overrides built-in defaults).

defaultEmotion.description: Fallback emotion when no keyword matches (default: "neutral").

emotionRules.description: Custom emotion detection rules: emotion name → array of keyword regex patterns. Merged with built-in rules.

additionalProperties.description: Array of case-insensitive keyword patterns for this emotion.

classifierModel.description: OpenClaw provider/model ID for LLM-based emotion classification (e.g. 'closedrouter-openai/gpt-4o-mini'). If not set, falls back to rule-based keyword matching.
